name: Alex Johnson
headline: Software Engineer | Full-Stack Developer
bio: Passionate developer with 5+ years of experience building scalable web applications. I love open-source, clean code, and learning new technologies.

posts.author: Alex Johnson
posts.content: Excited to share that I just launched my new open-source project! 🚀 Check it out on GitHub — contributions welcome!

posts.author: Alex Johnson
posts.content: Great article on modern PHP development practices. PHP 8.3 is a game changer — named arguments, readonly properties, and fibers make the language feel fresh again. Highly recommend it to anyone still sleeping on PHP! 💡

posts.author: Alex Johnson
posts.content: Attending #PHPConf this weekend. Looking forward to the talks on asynchronous PHP and modern architecture patterns. Drop a 👋 if you'll be there too!
